---
title: "Assignment 5"
author: "Patrick Torralba"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: library
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(plotly)

```

```{r}
#| label: load counties
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

us_counties.df <- st_read("USA_Counties/USA_Counties.shp") %>% janitor::clean_names()

```

# Task 1: USA Counties Data

## Plotting Kansas Counties by Age Under 5 Population

```{r}
#| label: fig-ks-counties-under5
#| fig-cap: "Age Under 5 Population Estimate for KS Counties"

ks_u5_pop.plot <- us_counties.df %>% 
  filter(state_name == "Kansas") %>% 
  mutate(
    text_label = str_c(name , "\nPopulation: ", round(age_under5 / 1000,0),"K") # hover label
        ) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = log(age_under5),
              text = text_label)) +
  labs(title = "Age Under 5 Population Estimate for KS Counties") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c("Age Under 5 (log)", option = "C") +
  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  theme_void()

ggplotly(ks_u5_pop.plot, tooltip = 'text') %>% 
  style(hoveron = 'fills')

```

## Plotting Kansas Counties by Asian Population

```{r}
#| label: fig-ks-counties-Asian
#| fig-cap: "Asian Population Estimate for Ks Counties"
#| fig-cap-location: "top"


ks_asian_pop.plot <- us_counties.df %>% 
  filter(state_name == "Kansas") %>% 
  mutate(
    text_label = str_c(name , "\nPopulation: ", round(asian / 1000,0),"K") # hover label
        ) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = log(asian),
              text = text_label)) +
  labs(title = "Asian Population Estimate for KS Counties") +
  scale_fill_viridis_b("Asian (log)", option = "D") +
  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  theme_void()

ggplotly(ks_asian_pop.plot, tooltip = 'text') %>% 
  style(hoveron = 'fills')

```


# Task 2: Census Data

## Kansas Census Map
```{r}
#| label: fig-KS-counties-median-age
#| fig-cap: "Kansas "
#| fig-cap-location: "top"



```
